headline: IST morning, Day 179 — the zero-EIN, zero-spend B2B HR email is unsent for a third straight business day since HR inboxes reopened Monday. The EIN certified-mail window opens tomorrow (Thu-Fri); the autoloop has now sat frozen at cycle 10 for 10 days on the same unfixed Mac permission.

spotlight.title: Send the B2B HR email — day 3 of the same ask
spotlight.detail: ~30 min, zero spend, ≤6 Apollo credits, no EIN needed. Monday flipped this lane from stage-it to send-it; it sat unsent through Tuesday and now Wednesday. 6 HR leaders pre-researched and cited: RNDC·Razon, KBR·Myles, eBay·Boone, Cloudflare·Russell, Atlassian·Prabhakar, Snap·Withycombe. Confirm each still in role, reveal the work emails (1 credit each), send the 3-touch CAN-SPAM sequence per 09_b2b_hr_lane/B2B_GO_LIVE_RUNBOOK.md.

spotlight.title: Fund Lob + approve the 77-lead postcard
spotlight.detail: ~$50-70 + 15 min — still the fastest path to a first booked appointment. 77/77 TIER1 California leads mailable, each carrying a per-lead QR so a booked appointment traces back to the exact mailing. Copy compliance-checked at 08_outreach/homeowner_postcard_directmail.md.

spotlight.title: Un-freeze the autoloop — 10 days overdue
spotlight.detail: launchd re-fails every 09:00/21:00 ("Operation not permitted") while the machine has sat frozen-complete at cycle 10 since Jun 28 — 10 days now. Grant the Full Disk Access permission, refresh the dead ATTOM key (401 at api.developer.attomdata.com), and queue the ~$25 BatchData fund. The EIN reply is due the same window — worth a daily check on the fax line too.

blockers.label: EIN
blockers.detail: Re-faxed Jun 27-28 on a live send/receive line; the ~8-business-day reply window opens tomorrow (Thu-Fri, Jul 9-10). Watch the fax line + inbox — the moment it lands, A2P submits. Neither the B2B HR email nor the Lob postcard wait on it.

blockers.label: Launch gates
blockers.detail: 5 founder taps, shortest first: send the B2B HR email (30 min, $0) · fund Lob + approve the postcard (~$50-70) · fill the 20 launch-config values once (unblocks all 3 lanes) · refresh the ATTOM key (Chitraksh, 1 min) · fund BatchData (~$25). Every lane underneath is built and merge-ready — day 3 of the same 5 asks.

blockers.label: Autoloop scheduler
blockers.detail: launchd job re-fails daily at 09:00 and 21:00 ("Operation not permitted"). The 5-minute permission fix un-freezes a machine that's been stuck at cycle 10 for 10 days since Jun 28.

tasks.lead: WALK INTO ENVISION HONDA MILPITAS · 1 PM PT
tasks.detail: suited up, fresh haircut, iPad with the Oraya-branded dealership deck. Ask for Greg (introduced you on phone yesterday) then GSM Mo. Reciprocity opener: "I'm semi-interested in the Prologue hybrid — mind if I poke around while we talk?" — lower the sales-resistance, demo the system on iPad once warm. Calendar event already created with location pinned + Chitraksh on as optional.

tasks.lead: Test outbound v126 + inbound v15 end-to-end
tasks.detail: on at least 2 fresh test scenarios · pretend-flow on inbound: voicemail callback → opt-in → calendar slot. Confirm calendar event, email confirmation, SMS — all three — land on each test.
(mailed May 22) · expected Thursday or Friday landing. The moment it hits, A2P submits.

tasks.lead: Plug Mom's policy from daughter's mother
tasks.detail: the manufactured $3K of ad-budget cash. Theresa policies cancelled with grace given her son's passing — don't disturb. Day-job checks running parallel.

tasks.lead: Pull up the Real Estate P3 visual reference
tasks.detail: with Chitraksh on the next sync · lock the deal-card UI design (comparables + ARV pie chart + urgency countdown). Plan for Mom + Art handoff once P2 generates first dollar.
back-end of month. Frankie's card on amazon.in with monitor (per Chitraksh's request). Coordinate Zoom unbox/setup. "Hold me to it — you should have it in the next 7 days."

tasks.lead: Pick a window for the Chitraksh-parents intro
tasks.detail: before 11am or after 8pm Frankie-time. Cup-of-coffee energy, not pitch.
May 23-26 slip-then-recover. Fixed block is the rule, not the suggestion.

tasks.lead: Test the inbound agent edited opener tonight
tasks.detail: confirm the outbound-snippet ported in worked correctly. If clean, tomorrow morning kick off the first 60-lead outbound batch.
Marketing Retainer + Meta ads next-out once A2P approves · Pizza Hut lesson logged (over-transparency = system risk) · military-couple compare-meeting still need to book if you want to retain.
lines open 8 AM PT; Chitraksh handles 8-11 AM India-side rotation; Frankie picks up post-day-job. Backup: file SS-4 via fax for guaranteed 4-business-day turnaround.
main HQ + linked Lead-Gen Dashboard + new Real Estate section + Lead-Gen tab. Vercel auto-deploys on push.
Chitraksh on standby in case Frankie needs a live G-Meet pull-in for live demo or live Q&A. Have outbound voice agent on demo-mode ready to dial Frankie's phone for in-person playback.

tasks.lead: Build the dynamic Oraya dealership deck
tasks.detail: from the Mercedes offer letter · Oraya UI / logo / color scheme · capability matrix · deliverables on PDF for Frankie's iPad.
$20 each on ATTOM + BatchData + PropertyRadar · same TX new-homeowner pull across all three · compare data quality + cold-outreach conversion · pick the winner.

tasks.lead: Verify outbound v126 + inbound v15 backend
tasks.detail: on 5 fresh test calls · confirm calendar / email / SMS / DNC / admin log all firing on each · spot-check the digit-conversion fix on at least 3 "spoken digit" emails.

port the single-prompt agent (archived from P2 fork) into the investor-blast prototype · ingest the Oraya site clone visual as the deal-card UI reference · scaffold a Postgres schema for the investor DB + the seller-contract DB.
(8:30 PM-11:30 PM IST) · ride out auto-disconnects, retry until a live agent picks up · certified-mail track running parallel.

tasks.lead: Twin Mind transcript → dashboard auto-update pipeline
tasks.detail: complete the webhook so post-block dashboard updates push automatically without manual edit-loop.
"Oraya Insurance Group" trade name vs. legal entity; file with operating county; publish in adjudicated newspaper for 4 consecutive weeks; bake receipt into the A2P package.
queue providers, prepare SoS filing, synchronized public-facing address flip the moment A2P approves.

tasks.lead: Stand up the CEO sub-agent on the Mac Mini
tasks.detail: when it arrives · first sub-agent online: dashboard. Then legal / engineer / marketing / lead-gen + follow-up one per shipping week.
day-trading agent (Frankie + Chitraksh aligned May 27 — revenue potential lower than P2/P3/voice, back-tests don't translate to live).

this update: title/banner/hero/countdown refreshed for Day 138; Real Estate (P3) section added; Lead-Gen section added with top-bar link; Voice AI section refreshed for v126/v15; Insurance section refreshed for backend-LIVE state; auto-pushed via PAT to hanfluxai-create/oraya-dashboard.

May 20-21 "Voice Agent Debugging / Mortgage Protection Script Rework / Texas Homeowner Lead Strategy"; May 23-24 "Claude Rate-Limit Outage / Daily Sync / Mortgage-Insurance Agent Script Testing / EIN Follow-up"; May 26-28 "Voice AI Launch Fixes / Insurance Inbound Testing / Dealership Outreach Strategy".

apply_email_digit_fix_2026-05-28.py drafted + applied on outbound v126; parity patch apply_inbound_parity_fix_2026-05-28.py applied on inbound v15. Pre/post snapshots saved in projects/p2-insurance/retell/snapshots/.
"Email digit handling rule" memory file noted as shipped v126 (2026-05-28). Voice-flow surgical-editing rule honored (str.replace only, never wholesale rewrite).
auto-flag EIN-related IRS communication (USPS certified-mail delivery), Envision Honda follow-up from Greg/Mo, Theresa cancellation processing, Mom's policy through daughter's mother.

tasks.lead: Multi-model fallback rule still in force
tasks.detail: ChatGPT + Gemini on shadow during Anthropic outages.
(max-autonomy rule holds).

done.what: Ran the Jul 7 PM cofounder sweep ahead of Frankie's PT morning — live inbox scan, board + state read, insurance + autoloop check, PM brief curated
Scanned the connected Oraya inbox — 0 items flagged: no EIN/IRS reply, no A2P, no Envision/Greg/Mo follow-up, no cancellations, no lead/opt-in traffic (only routine vendor/policy notices)
Board + state unchanged since the AM edition — nothing shipped, no new meeting/WhatsApp transcripts; the AM→PM delta is the clock, not the board: the IST workday passed with no gate moved
Autoloop still frozen at cycle 10 — its launchd job re-failed the 09:00 retry again ('Operation not permitted'); the 5-min permission fix keeps blocking an actively-retrying scheduler

⚠ Infra: the brief's build sandbox (node/git) was down this run — PM brief curated + Gmail draft delivered by hand; the Vercel publish + auto-send could not run, so the published page + auto-email may lag until the next healthy run

waiting.what: LOWEST-FRICTION first conversation (~30 min, ≤6 Apollo credits): the B2B HR lane can SEND today — HR inboxes have been open since Monday. Confirm the 6 pre-researched HR leaders still in role, reveal work emails, load the 3-touch CAN-SPAM sequence, approve before send. No 'stage for later' left — it fires now
FASTEST first booked appointment (~$50-70, 15 min): open + fund a Lob account and approve the postcard at 08_outreach/homeowner_postcard_directmail.md — mails the 77 TIER1 leads, QR-attributable
Fill the launch values once — unblocks all 3 lanes: cp 03_integrations/launch_config.template.env launch_config.env, fill 20 blanks, run apply_launch_config.py. Free + reversible
Refresh the ATTOM API key (1 min) — trial key returns 401. New key at api.developer.attomdata.com → overwrite .oraya-credentials/attom_api_key

Fund BatchData ~$25 to skip-trace the 77 HOF leads (appends emails → turns on the cold-email lane); plus the 5-min launchd permission fix — the autoloop re-failed at 09:00 today, so this now un-freezes an actively-retrying scheduler
